title: 'Photos from Pinterest': Atishi counters BJP’s ‘Sheesh Mahal 2’ charge at Arvind Kejriwal, says ‘could've used AI’
description: Atishi said that the images of a luxury home that were shown at the BJP press conference as Arvind Kejriwal's home were taken straight out of Pinterest. She also took a jibe at the saffron party, saying they could have just used AI.
